features: ESSENTIAL SKIN CARE: Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round
GENTLE: Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use
SKIN COMFORT: Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months
SAFE: Dermatologically tested cream with aloe vera extracts, suitable for use at any time to soften and moisturise
description: Product Description Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser with aloe vera extracts, suitable for use at any time to soften and moisturise. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Nuage is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Contains 350ml Ingredients Aloe Vera
